---
title: "Population Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial distribution, density, growth, composition, and migration of human populations."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include population-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Population Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include population-geography/01-population-distribution-density.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/02-demographic-transition.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/03-migration.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/04-population-policy.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include population-geography/05-population-resource-regions.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include population-geography/06-population-data-sources.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/07-fertility-mortality-analysis.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/08-population-composition.md >}}

{{< include population-geography/09-settlement-geography.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include population-geography/10-key-scholars-population.md >}}

---

{{< include population-geography/11-quick-reference.md >}}
